title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.887 - Sam Graves Heart of America bridge designated for a bridge on Route 9 in Kansas City
text:
227.887.  Sam Graves Heart of America bridge designated for a bridge on Route 9 in Kansas City. — The Heart of America Bridge, which carries Route 9 over the Missouri River in Kansas City, shall be renamed the "Sam Graves Heart of America Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2025 S.B. 348)
